title: Ulcerative Colitis in Caucasians: 11 Herbal Essential Oils for Symptom Relief
description: Cinchona officinalis essential oils have been found to have properties that may help alleviate symptoms of ulcerative colitis. The oil contains compounds like quinine, quinidine, and cinchonine, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. These constituents can help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, which is a common issue for people with ulcerative colitis.
